extraction_metadata.extractor: Claude Opus 4.8 (Cowork, PDF->JSON v3.1.0 single-pass, image-based); inline refs -> source_note
extraction_metadata.extraction_notes: Section 2 Flowchart, NN9536-4378 (semaglutide 2.4 mg, obesity). main_soa; IMAGE-BASED PDF (no text layer) - marks reconstructed by calibrated image mark-detection (grid-line geometry + per-cell dark-pixel count) and validated against visual reads on representative full-width rows (Concomitant medication, Trial product compliance, Body weight, HbA1c, insulin, evaluations). Header (Study Phase / Visit / Weeks / Window) repeated across doc pages 9-12 (merged into one file, encoded once). 34 visit columns (2-35): V=in-clinic, P=phone. Same structure/conventions as sister trials NCT03548987/NCT03548935 (inline section refs kept in activity_name; only the a/b/c/d superscript footnotes modelled). Hierarchy: 5 grey section headers (indent 0); sub-parents Body measurements / Vital signs (x2) / Administration of trial product (indent 1, no marks) with children at indent 2. Control of Eating Questionnaire uses a lowercase 'x' mark (cell_value 'x'); all other marks 'X'. Footnote b dedup over 4 activities. V33 visit-window is ±3 on pp9-10 vs ±5 on pp11-12 (encoded ±3). Abbreviation list: none present. Table S1-style detail: none.

table_metadata.table_purpose: Anchor schedule across Screening, Randomisation, Dose escalation, Maintenance, End of treatment, End of trial.
table_metadata.notes: Section 2 Flowchart. Single logical table, header repeated across doc pp 9-12 (encoded once). 34 visit columns; 63 rows incl. 5 section headers + 4 sub-parents. Image-based (full-page images, no text layer). Footnotes a-d on doc page 12.

schedule_properties.property_comment: Top grey header band: study phases. Screening (col 2), Randomisation (col 3), Dose escalation period (cols 4-11, merged), Maintenance period (cols 12-33, merged), End of treatment (col 34), End of trial (col 35). property_type=epoch. Label cell empty (synthesised name), matching the sister NN9536 trials.
Visit identifiers: V=in-clinic visit, P=phone visit. V1-V2 (Screening/Randomisation), P3-V10 (dose escalation), P11-V32 (maintenance), V33 (End of treatment), V34 (End of trial).
Nominal visit timing in weeks relative to randomisation (V2=week 0): -1, 0, 2..100, 104, 111.

Allowed visit window in days: -7 to 0 (Screening), 0 (Randomisation), ±3 (treatment visits), 0 to +5 (End of trial). NB source inconsistency: V33 window prints ±3 on doc pp9-10 and ±5 on pp11-12; encoded ±3 (first occurrence).

activities.activity_name: Hand out and instruct in food diary

activity_name_source.cell_text: Hand out and instruct in food diary (9)

annotations.annotation_text: Demography consists of date of birth, sex, ethnicity, and race (according to local regulation)
Smoking is defined as smoking at least one cigarette or equivalent daily
Applicable for US and Canada only
